# Release v1.4.3

Reduce package size by switching to tsup bundler and limiting published files to `dist/`.

---

## Changelog

## [1.4.3] - 2026-06-10

### Added

- `tsup` bundler added to `devDependencies` for faster builds and smaller package size
- `build:tsup` and `build:tsup:watch` scripts added to `package.json`
- `tsup.config.ts` configuration file for bundling with ESM, CJS, and type declarations output

### Changed

- `files` in `package.json` now only includes `dist/` (previously entire repo was packaged)
- `exports` updated to use new tsup output: `dist/index.js`, `dist/index.cjs`, `dist/index.d.ts`
- `.gitignore` updated to exclude tsup build artifacts

[1.4.3]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.4.2...v1.4.3
